note: Single shared operating point for ALL boundary conditions (PI decision 2026-07-20): selected from a plain coarse grid search (8 values per axis in r, r', beta; N in {16,24,32}; no refinement pass by design). Selection weighed the worst-boundary fixed-alpha map error together with the postselection probability; it is not the pure eps_F argmin. Supersedes selected_params.json (per-boundary selection from the earlier 81-point grid).
